event: Scene before a great mosque in India
description: A detailed painting showing the ornate facade of a great Mughal mosque with intricate tile work, pointed arches, and a tall minaret. Steps lead up to the decorated entrance archway. In the foreground, an elephant draped in red cloth stands alongside figures in turbans and robes. A horse and various seated and standing people populate the steps and plaza. The architecture is rendered in warm golden and cream tones with blue tile accents against a clear blue sky. The scene captures the bustle of daily life before a monumental religious building.

_meta.title: Before the great Jami Masjid mosque
